properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The circuit-rider preacher went riding through the land. With a rifle on His shoulder and a bible in His hand; He told the prairie people of a blessed Promised Land. As he went riding, singing along.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Leaning, leaning, Leaning on the everlasting arm; Leaning, leaning, Leaning on the everlasting arm.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He preached the coming judgment of fire and brimstone; And a glorious, endless of heaven of justified alone. As he rode across the mountains you could hear him sing his song. As he went riding on.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is power, power, wonder-working power. In the blood of the Lamb; There is power, power, wonder-working power. In the precious blood of the Lamb.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His rifle's old and rusty and it's hanging on the wall; His bible's worn and dusty, and it's seldom touched at all: But his Message from His Bible will meet us at the judgment day. For God's Truth keeps marching on.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Glory! Glory, hallelujah! Glory! Glory, hallelujah! Glory! Glory, hallelujah! His Truth is marching on.
